# KeyAway

> Free CD keys and giveaways for PC utility and optimization software.

KeyAway (https://www.keyaway.app) is a website that lists verified promotional CD keys for popular Windows programs. Visitors browse programs, copy keys, and read activation instructions. Content is managed in Sanity CMS; an admin dashboard handles analytics and key health.

## Main entry points

- https://www.keyaway.app/ — Home, featured and popular programs
- https://www.keyaway.app/programs — Full program listing
- https://www.keyaway.app/program/{slug} — Program detail, keys, instructions, related programs
- https://www.keyaway.app/privacy — Privacy policy
- https://www.keyaway.app/terms — Terms of use

## Optional

- https://www.keyaway.app/sitemap.xml — URL sitemap for crawlers
